label: Kiwix
install_message: Kiwix is available at http://kiwix.local (requires Traefik) or http://localhost:8888
install_warning: Place ZIM files in ~/.docker-containers/kiwix/data to make them available. Kiwix will restart repeatedly until a ZIM file is present.
remove_warning: This will stop the Kiwix container and permanently delete all data in ~/.docker-containers/kiwix.
